Notes: Ohio Wesleyan ends DePauw's 58-game winning streak, along with DePauw's
47-game winning streak in North Coast Athletic Conference competition.
DePauw's first-ever loss in 3 seasons of NCAC play.
Game.Location: Branch Rickey Arena; Delaware, Ohio, USA
Game.Officials: Evalyn Hammonds,  Joe Humeston,  Mike Pacak
